title: Is it a VOWEL or CONSONANT

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to take a character (C)(C)(C) as input and check whether the given character is a vowel or a consonant.

NOTE:−NOTE:-NOTE:−
Vowels are 'A', 'E', 'I', 'O', 'U'. Rest all alphabets are called consonants.


Input Format

First line will contain the character CCC.


Output Format
Print "Vowel" if the given character is a vowel, otherwise print "Consonant".
constraints: CCC willwillwill bebebe ananan upperupperupper casecasecase EnglishEnglishEnglish alphabetalphabetalphabet

solution.approach: Use multiple `if` conditions to compare the input character `C` with each vowel (‘A’, ‘E’, ‘I’, ‘O’, ‘U’).
